name: getpitch
description: YouTube 即時調性分析 Chrome 擴充功能（調號、最高音、拍速、建議演唱調）

scripts.version-check: node -e "const m=require('./manifest.json');const p=require('./package.json');if(m.version!==p.version){console.error('Version mismatch: manifest='+m.version+' package='+p.version);process.exit(1);}console.log('Versions in sync: '+m.version);"
